headline: One Year Later: We Predicted Visa Would Overtake Walmart. Here’s Where That Stands.
summary: On April 14, 2025, we argued that Visa (NYSE: V) would overtake Walmart (NYSE: WMT) in market cap within five years. Both have now reported full fiscal years, with Visa’s Q1 FY2026 landing on January 29, 2026, while Walmart posted FY26 on February 19, 2026. Turns out, the gap widened. The One-Year Scoreboard Isn’t Close ... One Year Later: We Predicted Visa Would Overtake Walmart. Here’s Where That Stands.

headline: Visa, Mastercard face new suit over card fees
summary: Three plaintiffs say a 2019 settlement in card fee litigation should not give the card networks years of legal immunity for antitrust claims.

headline: Assessing Visa (V) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness And Long Term Returns
summary: Visa stock snapshot after recent performance Visa (V) has drawn attention after a mixed stretch in its share performance, with a slight gain over the past month alongside negative returns over the past 3 months, year to date, and the past year. See our latest analysis for Visa. With the share price at US$311.29, Visa’s recent 30 day share price return of 2.25% contrasts with a weaker 90 day move of 4.62% and a year to date decline of 10.16%, while the 3 year total shareholder return of 39.57%...
